name: tca-timer
description: Monorepo root for the TCA Timer (shared, spa, server, desktop). The workspaces field exists primarily so deploy targets that build a single package from the repo root (notably Railway/Railpack for the judge SPA) can resolve `@tca-timer/shared` via an npm-managed symlink instead of the per-subdir `file:../shared` link that only works when the sibling directory is physically present. Local per-subdir `npm ci` (used by `*/Dockerfile.dev` and `docker-compose.yml`) still works unchanged because each `package.json` keeps its own `file:../shared` reference and its own lockfile.
